form:Form.mess: ¿Está seguro que desa cancelar la operación?
form:Form.name: NucleusRH.Base.Configuracion.Alertas.MAIL.MAIN.STD_REG.form

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select CFG05_IMAGENES.oi_file, CFG05_IMAGENES.d_imagen from CFG05_IMAGENES where CFG05_IMAGENES.oi_mail={$PARAM/@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select CFG06_SUBTYPES_MAIL.oi_subtype_mail, CFG06_SUBTYPES_MAIL.o_variables from CFG06_SUBTYPES_MAIL where CFG06_SUBTYPES_MAIL.oi_subtype_mail={$PARAM/@ID} ')/ROWS/ROW
